headline: Altria (NYSE:MO): A High-Yield Dividend Play with Solid Fundamentals Despite Payout Concerns
summary: Altria Group offers a high 5.83% dividend yield with strong profitability and low valuation. The stock scores a 7/10 dividend rating, balanced by a superb 9/10 profitability score and attractive P/E ratio of 13.03.
